audience_policies.source_phrase: The pass provides 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island or from Hingham to Peddocks Island. This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October. Georges Island *May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays *June 16 - September

coupon.source_phrase_block: The pass provides 50% off up to 4 ferry tickets from Boston to Spectacle Island and Georges Island or from Hingham to Peddocks Island. This is a SEASONAL pass available mid-May through early October. Georges Island *May 15 - June 14: Thursdays through Sundays *June 16 - September 1: daily Spectacle Island *July 15 - September 1: daily *September 4 - September 21: Thursdays through Sundays *September 26 - October 12: Fridays through Sundays Peddocks Island from Hingham *June 15 September 7: every day EXCEPT Tuesdays *September 10 - October 12: Thursdays through Sundays The most up-to-date information can be found at: www.bostonharborislands.org
